Metrics Report
We updated the Payment Solutions manual with a description of the new Interac e-Transfer Metrics Report. This report is not used for operational purposes (i.e., settlement, reconciliation, or tracing). It contains information that provides business intelligence on the performance of the service through your financial institution and market comparison on certain metrics. See the
secure site announcement
for more details and FAQs.

Section 7.1, Overview of Interac e-Transfer Reports
